name: Beijing Shiji Information Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Shiji Information Technology Co., Ltd. provides software solutions and services for the hospitality, food service, retail, and entertainment industries in China and internationally. It also offers payment gateways; data management solutions; IT services for restaurants; POS hardware, kitchen printers, and screens; inventory management software for restaurants; and e-commerce platforms for stores, products, orders, purchasing, delivery, maintenance, storage, finance, loyalty programs, and reporting. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
